name: Vetra Package
description: Manifest for a Vetra Reactor Package: bundles the metadata (name, description, category, author, keywords, source links) used to publish and discover the package in the Powerhouse ecosystem. Create one Vetra Package document per project; the document models, editors, processors, and subgraphs you add to the project are registered against this package at build time.

global.schema:
"""
Package metadata used to publish a Vetra Reactor Package to npm and surface
it inside Connect/Switchboard. All fields are optional so a package can be
created empty and filled in incrementally during development.
"""
type VetraPackageState {
  """Human-readable package name (e.g. 'Pizza Plaza'). Distinct from the npm package id."""
  name: String
  """One-paragraph summary of what the package provides. Shown on package listing pages."""
  description: String
  """Free-form category label used to group packages in directories (e.g. 'Finance', 'Productivity')."""
  category: String
  """Author/maintainer information surfaced in the published package metadata."""
  author: Author!
  """Search keywords associated with the package. Each keyword has a stable id so it can be removed individually."""
  keywords: [Keyword!]!
  """Public source code URL (typically a GitHub repository)."""
  githubUrl: URL
  """Published npm package URL. Set once the package has been released."""
  npmUrl: URL
}

"""Author/maintainer of the Vetra Package."""
type Author {
  """Display name of the author or organization."""
  name: String
  """Author's website URL."""
  website: URL
}

"""A single search keyword attached to the package."""
type Keyword {
  """Stable identifier for the keyword entry; used to remove it."""
  id: OID!
  """Display label for the keyword (e.g. 'invoicing', 'defi')."""
  label: String!
}

modules.name: base_operations
modules.description: Setters for the package's identity, author, keywords, and source/distribution links.

operations.name: SET_PACKAGE_NAME
operations.description: Set the human-readable package name shown in listings and the Connect UI.

operations.name: SET_PACKAGE_DESCRIPTION
operations.description: Set the one-paragraph summary describing what the package does.

operations.name: SET_PACKAGE_CATEGORY
operations.description: Set the category label used to group the package in directories (e.g. "Finance", "Productivity").

operations.name: SET_PACKAGE_AUTHOR
operations.description: Replace the author block in a single call. Either field may be omitted to clear it.

operations.name: SET_PACKAGE_AUTHOR_NAME
operations.description: Set only the author's display name without touching the website field.

operations.name: SET_PACKAGE_AUTHOR_WEBSITE
operations.description: Set only the author's website URL without touching the name field.

operations.name: ADD_PACKAGE_KEYWORD
operations.description: Append a search keyword. Caller supplies a stable id so the entry can be removed later.

operations.name: REMOVE_PACKAGE_KEYWORD
operations.description: Remove a keyword by its id. No-op if the id does not exist.

operations.name: SET_PACKAGE_GITHUB_URL
operations.description: Set the public source code URL (typically a GitHub repository).

operations.name: SET_PACKAGE_NPM_URL
operations.description: Set the published npm package URL once the package has been released.
